title: 亡羊补牢
meaning: 比喻出了问题以后想办法补救

scenes.title: 羊圈破洞
scenes.prompt: A sheep pen with a hole, a wolf watching nearby, cartoon style, night scene
scenes.narration: 羊圈破了个洞，狼趁机偷走了几只羊。

scenes.title: 修补羊圈
scenes.prompt: A shepherd fixing the fence of sheep pen, cartoon style, determined expression
scenes.narration: 邻居劝他赶快修补羊圈。

scenes.title: 羊群安全
scenes.prompt: A happy shepherd with safe sheep in a repaired pen, cartoon style, happy ending
scenes.narration: 他修好羊圈后，再也没有丢过羊。
